text: Use the task tool to launch a subagent (the built-in 'explore' agent) that first reads the README.md file in the current directory, then runs the shell command `sleep 30`, then reports the file's first heading. Do not reply to me until that subagent is completely finished.

state.title: Read README.md and report its first heading after sleeping for 30 seconds.

input.description: Read README.md and report its first heading after sleeping for 30 seconds.
input.prompt: Read the README.md file in the current directory, then run the shell command sleep 30, and finally report the file's first heading.
